commands.review_summary:
Routes Mattermost send attachment-shaped media through the upload path, widens outbound media-source/workspace handling, adds regression coverage, and carries several static-check repair commits.

PR surface: Source +161, Tests +736. Total +897 across 24 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main's Mattermost send action only forwards `params.media`, while the shared message tool and linked report use filePath/path/attachments shapes. I did not run a live Mattermost server in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human maintainer review should decide the compatibility/API contract and live-proof waiver after the branch is refreshed; there is no narrow automated repair to queue from this review.
